name: io.github.cyanheads/faa-aircraft-registry-mcp-server
description: Offline, keyless lookup of the US civil aircraft registry — decode N-numbers, search records.

environmentVariables.name: FAA_REDACT_OWNER_PII
environmentVariables.description: Redact owner name/address and disable owner-name search. Redacted by default; set to false only on trusted local installs. Unset/empty/malformed resolves to redacted.

environmentVariables.name: FAA_MIRROR_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Filesystem path to the SQLite registry index file.

environmentVariables.name: FAA_DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Source URL for the FAA Releasable Aircraft Database ZIP (used by mirror:init/refresh only).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: FAA_REDACT_OWNER_PII
environmentVariables.description: Redact owner name/address and disable owner-name search. Redacted by default; set to false only on trusted local installs. Unset/empty/malformed resolves to redacted.

environmentVariables.name: FAA_MIRROR_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Filesystem path to the SQLite registry index file.

environmentVariables.name: FAA_DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Source URL for the FAA Releasable Aircraft Database ZIP (used by mirror:init/refresh only).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
